  "findings": [
    "Unshielded rubber coupling installed underground in violation of IPC requirements",
    "Improper material transition method for buried piping"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace unshielded rubber coupling with shielded coupling listed for underground use per manufacturer instructions",
    "Verify coupling is properly torqued and bedded in accordance with code and listing"
  ],
  "rationale": "Unshielded rubber couplings lack the mechanical restraint required for underground joints. IPC Section 705.14 and manufacturer listings mandate shielded couplings for buried transitions to prevent joint separation, leakage, and pipe movement. Continued use risks catastrophic failure, ground contamination, and safety hazards.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 705.14",
    "Manufacturer listing requirements for underground shielded couplings"
  ]
}
